name: M1.2 力与平衡（力分解/摩擦）
subject: math
curriculum_points: • use the expansion of (a + b)n, where n is a positive integer
• use the formulae for the nth term and for the sum of the first n terms to solve problems involving arithmetic or geometric progressions
• use the condition for the convergence of a geometric progression, and the formula for the sum to infinity of a convergent geometric progression.

excerpts.text: • use the expansion of (a + b)n, where n is a positive integer
• use the formulae for the nth term and for the sum of the first n terms to solve problems involving arithmetic or geometric progressions
• use the condition for the convergence of a geometric progression, and the formula for the sum to infinity of a convergent geometric progression.

interactive_resources.description: PhET 力与运动基础：推拉小车观察加速度（中文版）
GeoGebra 牛顿第二定律 F=ma 参数调节
PhET 可逆反应：化学平衡（中文版）
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「M1.2 力与平衡（力分解/摩擦）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：• use the expansion of (a + b)n, where n is a positive integer…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• recognise arithmetic and geometric progressions… 对理解「M1.2 力与平衡（力分解/摩擦）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
